    Index

    A C D E G H I L M P S T U 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    A

    AddTagController - Class in photos.controller
    Controller for the Add Tag dialog (AddTag.fxml).
    AddTagController() - Constructor for class photos.controller.AddTagController
    Creates the controller used by the Add Tag FXML dialog.
    AdminController - Class in photos.controller
    Controller for the admin subsystem.
    AdminController() - Constructor for class photos.controller.AdminController
    Creates the controller for the admin subsystem scene.
    Album - Class in photos.model
    Represents a named album containing references to Photo objects.
    Album(String) - Constructor for class photos.model.Album
    Constructs an empty album with the given name.
    AlbumController - Class in photos.controller
    Controller for the album detail screen.
    AlbumController() - Constructor for class photos.controller.AlbumController
    Creates the controller for the album-detail scene.
    AlbumsController - Class in photos.controller
    Controller for the user's album list screen.
    AlbumsController() - Constructor for class photos.controller.AlbumsController
    Creates the controller for the albums overview scene.
    AppState - Class in photos.model
    Singleton holding application-wide session state shared across controllers.

    C

    clear() - Static method in class photos.model.AppState
    Resets all session state.

    D

    DataStore - Class in photos.model
    Handles all persistence for the Photos application using Java serialization (ObjectOutputStream / ObjectInputStream).
    deleteUserFile(String) - Static method in class photos.model.DataStore
    Removes the persisted file for the given username, if it exists.

    E

    equals(Object) - Method in class photos.model.Photo
    Two photos are equal if and only if they reference the same absolute file path.
    equals(Object) - Method in class photos.model.Tag
    Two tags are equal when both name and value are identical.

    G

    getAbsolutePath() - Method in class photos.model.Photo
    Returns the absolute file-system path of this photo.
    getAlbums() - Method in class photos.model.User
    Returns the mutable list of albums owned by this user.
    getCaption() - Method in class photos.model.Photo
    Returns the user-supplied caption, or an empty string if none has been set.
    getCurrentAlbum() - Static method in class photos.model.AppState
    Returns the album currently open in the album view.
    getCurrentUser() - Static method in class photos.model.AppState
    Returns the currently logged-in user, or null if no session is active.
    getDateTaken() - Method in class photos.model.Photo
    Returns the capture date, derived from the file's last-modified time.
    getEarliestDate() - Method in class photos.model.Album
    Returns the earliest Photo.getDateTaken() among all photos, or null if the album is empty or no dates are set.
    getLatestDate() - Method in class photos.model.Album
    Returns the latest Photo.getDateTaken() among all photos, or null if the album is empty or no dates are set.
    getName() - Method in class photos.model.Album
    Returns the album name.
    getName() - Method in class photos.model.Tag
    Returns the tag type name.
    getPhotos() - Method in class photos.model.Album
    Returns the mutable list of photos in this album.
    getSearchResults() - Static method in class photos.model.AppState
    Returns the most recent search result set.
    getTags() - Method in class photos.model.Photo
    Returns the mutable set of tags associated with this photo.
    getTagType() - Method in class photos.controller.AddTagController
    Returns the tag type entered or selected.
    getTagValue() - Method in class photos.controller.AddTagController
    Returns the tag value entered by the user.
    getUsername() - Method in class photos.model.User
    Returns this user's login name.
    getValue() - Method in class photos.model.Tag
    Returns the tag value.
    go(Stage, String, String) - Static method in class photos.controller.SceneRouter
    Loads the given FXML resource, replaces the stage's current scene, and returns the controller instance created by the FXML loader.

    H

    hashCode() - Method in class photos.model.Photo
     
    hashCode() - Method in class photos.model.Tag
     

    I

    init() - Method in class photos.controller.AdminController
    Populates the user list from disk.
    init() - Method in class photos.controller.AlbumController
    Loads and displays the current album from AppState.
    init() - Method in class photos.controller.AlbumsController
    Populates the album list from the current user in AppState.
    init() - Method in class photos.controller.SearchController
    Populates tag-type combos from the saved registry.
    init(Map) - Method in class photos.controller.AddTagController
    Populates the tag-type combo with all currently registered types.
    initStockUserIfNeeded() - Static method in class photos.model.DataStore
    Creates the stock user and album from image files in data/stock/stock/ if the stock user has not yet been initialized.
    isMultipleAllowed() - Method in class photos.controller.AddTagController
    Returns true if the user checked "Allow multiple values" for a new tag type.

    L

    load(Path, Class) - Static method in class photos.model.DataStore
    Deserializes an object of type T from file.
    loadTagTypes() - Static method in class photos.model.DataStore
    Loads the tag-type registry (name → allowsMultiple).
    loadUser(String) - Static method in class photos.model.DataStore
    Loads the User object for the given username from disk.
    loadUsernames() - Static method in class photos.model.DataStore
    Returns the list of registered usernames, or an empty list on first run.
    LoginController - Class in photos.controller
    Controller for the login screen.
    LoginController() - Constructor for class photos.controller.LoginController
    Creates the controller for the login scene.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class photos.Photos
    Launches the JavaFX application.

    P

    Photo - Class in photos.model
    Represents one physical photo on disk.
    Photo(Path) - Constructor for class photos.model.Photo
    Constructs a new Photo referencing the given file.
    photos - module photos
    JavaFX module descriptor for the Photos application.
    photos - package photos
     
    Photos - Class in photos
    Main JavaFX entry point for the Photos application.
    Photos() - Constructor for class photos.Photos
    Creates the JavaFX application instance.
    photos.controller - package photos.controller
     
    photos.model - package photos.model
     

    S

    save(Path, Serializable) - Static method in class photos.model.DataStore
    Serializes object to file, creating parent directories as needed.
    saveTagTypes(Map) - Static method in class photos.model.DataStore
    Persists the tag-type registry.
    saveUser(User) - Static method in class photos.model.DataStore
    Serializes the user's current state (albums + photos + tags) to disk.
    saveUsernames(List) - Static method in class photos.model.DataStore
    Persists the current list of registered usernames.
    SceneRouter - Class in photos.controller
    Utility for switching scenes on a Stage.
    SearchController - Class in photos.controller
    Controller for the search screen.
    SearchController() - Constructor for class photos.controller.SearchController
    Creates the controller for the search scene.
    setCaption(String) - Method in class photos.model.Photo
    Sets the caption.
    setCurrentAlbum(Album) - Static method in class photos.model.AppState
    Sets the album to display in the album view.
    setCurrentUser(User) - Static method in class photos.model.AppState
    Sets the currently logged-in user.
    setDateTaken(Instant) - Method in class photos.model.Photo
    Sets the capture date (typically the file's last-modified timestamp).
    setName(String) - Method in class photos.model.Album
    Renames this album.
    setSearchResults(List) - Static method in class photos.model.AppState
    Stores search results so the search controller can create an album from them.
    start(Stage) - Method in class photos.Photos
    Builds the initial scene (login) and registers a close handler that saves the current user's data before the application exits.
    stop() - Method in class photos.Photos
    Called by the JavaFX runtime when the application is about to stop.

    T

    Tag - Class in photos.model
    An immutable (name, value) tag pair, e.g.
    Tag(String, String) - Constructor for class photos.model.Tag
    Constructs a tag with the given type name and value (both trimmed).
    toString() - Method in class photos.model.Album
     
    toString() - Method in class photos.model.Tag
    Returns a human-readable representation in "name=value" format.

    U

    User - Class in photos.model
    Represents a single application user and all of their albums.
    User(String) - Constructor for class photos.model.User
    Constructs a new user with the given username.
    USERS_DIR - Static variable in class photos.model.DataStore
    Directory holding per-user serialized files.
